scene_title: Joao de Patmos diante da Assembleia da ONU
narrative_beat: Postura de testemunho em branco e ouro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid apostle John in solemn witness stance in white and gold robes with expression of one who saw future being fulfilled wide-eyed yet serene with open hands in revelation gesture in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: John's wide-eyed yet serene expression and open hands in revelation gesture
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated United Nations General Assembly seen from distance with grey podium and screens in background
props: apostle John in white and gold

mood.emotion: nineteen centuries of absurdity resolved in one generation

symbolism.primary: John stands before the body that governs the world he described
symbolism.secondary: open hands as testimony — I told you and here it is

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
